title: Protesters waving flags and shouting with their right arms raised
description: The student protesters honoured thousands of those killed when nationwide mass protests were put down last month.

title: US President Donald Trump addresses a press conference about the Supreme Court's striking down of most of his tariffs in the briefing room at the White House in Washington, DC, USA, 20 February 2026
description: After most of his tariffs were outlawed on Friday, Trump announced new global tariffs of 10% - which he says he has now increased to 15%.

title: A heavily damaged vehicle with warped metal is surrounded by rubble from what appears to be a destroyed building behind it. A man is standing in the distance.
description: Pakistan says the strikes were retaliation for recent suicide bombings in the country.

title: Lim Young-woong gestures a heart shape with both of his arms raised above his head
description: The traditional South Korean popular music genre is making headlines in the country once again.

title: Nisha Vaishnav, who has cropped hair, is dressed in a yellow football shirt looking away from the camera
description: Two sisters in an Indian village talk about how football has changed their lives and helped them push back against child marriage.

title: Donald Trump gesturing behind a lectern while wearing a blue suit jacket, white shirt and red cap with "MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN" written across the front in large white letters.
description: Just a year into Trump's second term, and about half of Project 2025's policies have been implemented, observers say.

title: Kyle Waddell, Hammy McMillan, Bobby Lammie, Grant Hardie and Bruce Mouat with their silver medals
description: Who are Great Britain's silver medal-winning curlers? And what might be next for them after another heartbreak?

title: Tabitha Stoecker and Matt Weston celebrate winning gold in the team skeleton event at the Winter Olympics in Milan-Cortina
description: BBC Sport explores the special scheme which has taken athletes to gold medal glory in sports they had never tried before.

title: Canada and USA
description: Milan-Cortina 2026 has been one of the most eventful Winter Olympics in history - in sporting and political terms - so it is appropriate that the final medal event could be the most enticing of all.

title: Winter Olympics daily guide graphic
description: What's happening and who to look out for at the 2026 Winter Olympics in Milan-Cortina.

title: A crane lifts red and blue shipping containers from vessel
description: The Supreme Court's decision has led questions over whether people can get a refund over the unlawful tariffs.

title: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor and Prince William, Prince of Wales attend Katharine, Duchess of Kent's Requiem Mass
description: Andrew's arrest has changed the public's view of the Royal Family, putting pressure on Prince William as he moves closer to being king.

title: Nisha Vaishnav, who has cropped hair, is dressed in a yellow football shirt looking away from the camera
description: Two sisters in an Indian village talk about how football has changed their lives and helped them push back against child marriage.

title: Laviai is stood with her hands on her hips looking up. She is wearing a GB navy tight fitting running vest. The words Great Britain are printed in red on her chest. She has a name tag with Nielsen on
description: Studies show burnout in young people is rising and there are a number of reasons why.

title: Illustration of young woman reading a bible
description: A fierce debate is taking place about whether there really has been a revival in Christianity.

title: The U.S. Supreme Court as seen on February 20, 2026 in Washington, DC.
description: The Supreme Court has weakened Trump's hand in dealing with other nations, writes Anthony Zurcher.

title: President Trump puts his hand on Prime Minister Mark Carney's shoulder. Carney stands in profile. They are outdorrs and behind them are White House windows.
description: Canada, the US and Mexico are gearing up negotiations as part of a review of the USMCA this summer.

title: A white truck in front of stacks of different-coloured cargo containers at a port
description: If you think the Supreme Court ruling heralds a return to pre-Trump business as usual - think again.

title: A tortoise with genes of the Floreana Island giant tortoise species eats in a breeding centre at the Galapagos National Park
description: The native species was driven to extinction by sailors in the 1800s. Now, 158 juvenile giant tortoises have been reintroduced to the island.

title: A composite image showing a graphic of a phone with an image of a young black man wearing a black balaclava and a gold chain shouting and raising his hands. In the background is a still from an AI vid
description: Deepfakes showing grim taxpayer-funded waterparks have gone viral and drawn some racist responses.

title: Former prime minister Boris Johnson speaking while holding out both hands. In the foreground, out of focus, we see the back of a woman with blonde hair.
description: Troops should be deployed to peaceful parts of the country in non-fighting roles, he said.

title: Orange and white Artemis rocket next to a towering grey space system and a blue, white, and red starts and stripes flag, against a blue sky
description: The mission to the far side of the Moon and back will be postponed after problems with were spotted with its rocket, a Nasa official said.

title: Headshot of Andrew who looks off to the side with his mouth slightly open. The background is blurry but it appears there's a person walking behind him
description: A cross-party committee will also look into the appointment and accountability of UK trade envoys.

title: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola with his arms raised in celebration at the final whistle after the vital Premier League victory against Newcastle United.
description: As Manchester City continue to crank up the pressure on Arsenal, Pep Guardiola tells his players to take three days off to "enjoy life" with "caipirinhas and daiquiris".

description: Who are Great Britain's silver medal-winning curlers? And what might be next for them after another heartbreak?

title: Wesley Fofana and Hannibal Mejbri compete for the ball during the Premier League match between Chelsea and Burnley at Stamford Bridge
description: Burnley midfielder Hannibal Mejbri and Chelsea defender Wesley Fofana have spoken out on social media after being sent racist abuse in the aftermath of the clubs' Premier League match on Saturday.

title: Brendon McCullum, England head coach, and Harry Brook of England are seen ahead of the ICC Men's T20 World Cup India & Sri Lanka 2026 match between England and Scotland at Eden Gardens
